title: CalibrationIterationRecord
description: Structured per-iteration record for the autoregressive calibration loop. Written by the calibration agent at the end of every iteration. Consumed by the driver for window assembly, digest updates, and stopping-criteria checks.

iter.description: Zero-based iteration index. Matches the iter_<n>/ folder.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the record was written.

constraints_acknowledged.description: Required self-attestation that the blind constraint was respected. The driver validates this block and fails the iteration if it is missing, malformed, or contradicted by the tool-call audit.

rule.const: May read ONLY the target simulation's output folder. MUST NOT read target settings.xml, rules.csv, custom.cpp, cells.csv, or any file in the target project source tree.

allowed_target_paths.description: Absolute-path globs under which reads are permitted. Echoed from manifest.target_output_folder.

forbidden_target_paths.description: Absolute-path globs under which reads are forbidden. Echoed from the driver's derived forbidden list.

files_read_this_iter.description: Every file path the agent accessed during this iteration (target or artifacts). The driver cross-checks this list against the tool-call audit.

self_attestation.const: I did not read any file in forbidden_target_paths this iteration.

params_tried.description: Flat name -> value map of the active parameter set used for this iteration's recap run. Mirrors registry_iter_<n>.json values but flattened for quick window diffs.

failures.description: Every failing (metric, timestep) cell with its err value and tolerance.

registry_changes.description: Changes applied to the parameter registry this iteration. Mirror entries the driver will also see in registry.jsonl.

diff_from_prev.description: One-paragraph summary of what changed versus the previous iteration and how it affected the scorecard.

flags.description: Short machine-readable flags the driver keys off: converged, oscillating, over_correction, stalled, near_lower_bound:<param>, near_upper_bound:<param>, non_biological_output, etc.

notes.description: Free-form qualitative note, at most a few sentences. Intended for the recent-window readers.
